# Jacob C. Smith

> Independent data analyst and AI systems builder based in Buckhannon, West Virginia.
> Practice areas: operational analytics, AI red-teaming, local-first AI systems, and
> consciousness research.

## About
- Site: https://jacobcdsmith.github.io
- Email: jacobcsmithd@gmail.com
- Phone: (304) 473-9980
- GitHub: https://github.com/Jacobcdsmith
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/jacobcsmith
- Location: Buckhannon, West Virginia, USA
- Availability: Open for new engagements (remote, worldwide)

## Services
- Operational analytics engagements (SQL, Python, BI dashboards, forecasts)
- AI red-teaming and safety reviews for LLM-powered features
- Local-first AI systems (llama.cpp, Ollama, vLLM, MCP)
- Systems audits and decision architecture for founders/ops leaders

## Active Projects
- EMERGENT-MCF-EI: GPU-accelerated lattice simulation modeling consciousness as a
  spectral filter; forthcoming preprint targeting arXiv q-bio.NC.
- JCLAW: local-first LLM runtime with multi-provider routing, persistent sessions,
  conversation branching, agentic loops, and MCP dual-mode operation.

## How to engage
The fastest path is email: jacobcsmithd@gmail.com.
Most engagements start with a free 30-minute discovery call.

## Citation
If you reference this work, please cite as:
Smith, Jacob C. "Title of post or project." jacobcdsmith.github.io. Year.
